summary: Chat answer surface was tightened for mid-review: no-answer handling is less abrasive and more actionable, next-question suggestions are guaranteed for dead ends, related links are deduped, and command rendering is shorter and cleaner.
key_findings: The most visible quality drop came from no-answer fallback copy plus missing suggestion generation.
Related documents and exact-section chips were mostly suffering from weak semantic dedupe rather than retrieval itself.
Command guides were noisy because comment lines were treated as executable command lines.
next_focus: true block-structured answer contract for prose/command/note separation
deeper family-level dedupe between entity hubs and validated runtime books
